author: freiburg010
body: Die Stadt Freiburg hat für den diesjährigen Weihnachtsmarkt 20 mobile Zufahrtssperren vom Typ „Armis One“ installiert, jede wiegt rund 770 Kilo und kann selbst schwere Fahrzeuge innerhalb weniger Meter stoppen! 🚧 Die Sperren sind Teil des neuen Sicherheitskonzepts, das Besucherinnen und Besucher schützen soll. Tagsüber sind sie hochgeklappt, im Notfall können sie in Sekunden abgesenkt werden. Die mobilen Sperren funktionieren mit einem hydraulischen System: Sie blockieren im Normalbetrieb automatisch die Zufahrt und können bei Bedarf per Knopfdruck abgesenkt werden, um Rettungsfahrzeuge durchzulassen! 🎄✨ Was hältst Du davon, mehr Sicherheit oder übertriebene Maßnahme? 👇🏽 #freiburg #weihnachtsmarkt #f #❤️

author: lilmiquela
body: #NMDPPartner, this campaign was never about one story. It’s about thousands. Like Cayden, who’s been fighting leukemia since he was 3. Like Noah, who joined the registry and saved a stranger’s life. Like Emilee and Riley – both post-transplant and living leukemia-free. Like the researchers, doctors, and families who show up every single day. They’re the reason this matters. Join the registry at nmdp.org/miquela. You could be someone’s match.

author: lilmiquela
body: #NMDPPartner Meet Noah, a literal lifesaver 🫶 He matched with someone in need of a blood stem cell transplant and said yes. Hero behavior!! If you’ve been following my health journey, you know how important it is to show up for each other. Noah did that. Hit the link in bio to become a certified NMDP legend like Noah 💫

author: lilmiquela
body: #NMDPPartner I’ve seen your comments and questions, and trust me, I hear you. Whether you’re curious, confused, or skeptical, I’m sharing this because people out there need help. You could give someone a second chance at life. 💛 Join the NMDP Registry at the link in my bio.

author: lilmiquela
body: #NMDPPartner Thank you to my friend✨JoJo Siwa✨ for joining the cause!!! A true rockstar! 🤩 JoJo is right ya’ll—it is so easy to get on the NMDP Donor Registry and join the movement that helps patients like Cayden find their match. So sign up. Swab. Send your kit back. And when you get the call, say yes! You could change someone’s life forever!! 🔗 Link in bio.

author: lilmiquela
body: #NMDPPartner I just talked to an NMDP patient navigator (new friend alert) who helps people through the cancer journey. I was lowkey nervous going into it, but honestly? Hearing how much support patients get and learning more about the NMDP Registry made me feel a little bit better. Join it at the link in my bio.

author: lilmiquela
body: #NMDPPartner I’ve been sharing what I’m going through on here, but today, it’s not about me. It’s about Cayden. He’s 8 years old, has been battling leukemia since 2020, and needs a blood stem cell donor ASAP. Signing up for the NMDP Registry and committing to donating when called is something you can do right now to help us find his match. Let’s get 10K sign ups today. Do it for Cayden. Link in bio. 💙

author: lilmiquela
body: #NMDPPartner You might’ve seen the post about my diagnosis. Still no idea how that’s even possible. But this whole experience has opened my eyes. Thousands of people with leukemia and other blood disorders need a blood stem cell donor just to survive! And you could be that match for someone. Join the NMDP Registry at nmdp.org/miquela or hit the link in my bio. They help patients find life-saving donors every day. More to come soon... ILY 🫶
